title: unel Snowflake Christmas Stocking, Red Tartan Pattern & Snowflake Design, Large Xmas Stockings for Adults & Kids
features: Christmas Stocking - a classic festive xmas stocking for the holiday period for all the family
Premium Quality - soft fury texture and red tartan plaid finishings. Comes with small snowflake name tags to help identify the right stocking for santa!

Beautiful Xmas Decoration - ideal for the christmas tree or over a fireplace mantle, stand out with a stocking that goes beyond the ordinary, blending classic design with festive flair and making your holiday decor truly special
Large Size - 45cm x 6cm generously sized to hold plenty of treats and surprises, this stocking is not only a beautiful decoration but also a functional part of your festive celebrations
For Adults or Kids - Stand out with a stocking that goes beyond the ordinary, blending classic design with festive flair and making your holiday decor truly special
description: Introducing our exquisite snowflake Christmas Stocking – a festive blend of timeless elegance and cosy charm. This enchanting stocking is sure to become a cherished part of your holiday traditions, adding a touch of winter magic to your home. The stocking features a classic red tartan top that captures the essence of traditional holiday warmth. The rich red hues evoke a sense of festive joy, making it a perfect addition to your Christmas decor. The tartan pattern adds a touch of sophistication, reminiscent of a cosy cabin in the snowy woods. At the cuff, soft and luxurious white fur creates a delightful contrast, resembling the pure, glistening snow. The fur adds a tactile element, inviting you to reach out and feel the plush texture, while also creating a striking visual impact. It's the perfect accompaniment to the festive tartan, creating a harmonious blend of comfort and style. What sets our snowflake Christmas Stocking apart is the intricate snowflake embroidery that adorns the body of the stocking. Delicate and intricate, the snowflakes sparkle with a subtle shimmer, catching the light and adding a magical touch to your holiday decor. Each snowflake is a unique piece of art, symbolising the beauty of the season.
